title: DynamicAppIO
content:
# DynamicAppIO


## Properties

- **type_name** (`string`): Dynamic I/O type name.
- **data_types** (`array`): List of data types that the dynamic I/O type can have. If empty, any data type is allowed.
- **ownership** (`string`): 
- **type** (`string`):
summary: Object with properties: type_name, data_types, ownership, type

items.description: Primitive data types are: `string`, `number`, `boolean` and `object`. If another name is used, it will be considered an object with that name. It's highly recommended using a custom name when using objects.

data_types.description: List of data types that the dynamic I/O type can have. If empty, any data type is allowed.
